block.vim: ACTION BLOCKED. Interactive editors freeze the environment. Use your native 'edit' tool.

block.nano: ACTION BLOCKED. Interactive editors freeze the environment. Use your native 'edit' tool.
block.less: ACTION BLOCKED. Interactive pagers lock up the execution pipeline. Use your native 'read' tool.

block.top: ACTION BLOCKED. Infinite monitoring tools are permanently disabled.
block.htop: ACTION BLOCKED. Infinite monitoring tools are permanently disabled.
block.man: ACTION BLOCKED. The manual viewer hangs the agent.
